name: Suspicious Control Panel DLL Load Detected
description: Detects the execution of `rundll32.exe` from `control.exe`, a suspicious activity that could indicate an adversary is using a signed binary proxy execution technique to evade security defenses. This technique has been observed in attacks by groups like Equation Group.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious process, **`rundll32.exe`**, was launched by **`control.exe`**. The command line is **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Signed Binary Proxy Execution** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1218.011**), a technique used by adversaries to execute malicious code while masquerading as a legitimate Windows process. This activity is a significant red flag for **Defense Evasion**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious code. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed by control.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
